title: andropogon monticola
intro: Andropogon monticola, also known as broom grass or broom sedge, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Andropogon monticola include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Andropogon monticola can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
